revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-8-255

Alternative term: Hose-protected enclosure (or machine), hose-proof enclosure (or machine)

An enclosure (or machine) designed to prevent the ingress of jets of water reaching it from any direction.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Water-jet protected enclosure (or machine)}}
